prompt: What should I study next? I've mastered linear algebra and gradient descent, but multi-layer networks and backpropagation are still not-started.

assertions.text: Skill triggers: Claude invokes or follows the knowledge-base skill
Discovery approach: Claude uses rg/Glob to search for meta.yaml files (not a fixed knowledge/ directory)
Name-based resolution: Claude resolves depends entries by matching the name field, not folder slugs
Correct readiness logic: Identifies topics whose deps are all mastered/reviewed as ready-to-study
Advisory only: Claude presents findings and lets user decide, does not block
